DOWNFALLU-ADAPT.description: At the start of your turn, you can [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card to gain {AdaptPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-ADAPT.title: Adapt
DOWNFALLU-BIG_SHOT.description: Whenever you trigger a [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect, gain {BigShotPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-BIG_SHOT.title: Smoking Barrel
DOWNFALLU-BLACK_WIND.description:
Deal damage equal to your missing HP.{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
DOWNFALLU-BLACK_WIND.title: Black Wind
DOWNFALLU-BODY_ARMOR.description:
Discard a card.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If it was a non-Attack, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] again.
DOWNFALLU-BODY_ARMOR.title: Body Armor
DOWNFALLU-BRAWL.description: At the start of your turn, apply {BrawlPower:diff()} [gold]Bruise[/gold] to ALL enemies.
DOWNFALLU-BRAWL.title: Brawl
DOWNFALLU-CALLED_SHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card played this turn triggered [gold]Dead On[/gold], draw a card.
DOWNFALLU-CALLED_SHOT.title: Called Shot
DOWNFALLU-CHEAT.description:
Play one of the top {Cards:diff()} cards in your draw pile.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]: Also trigger its [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect.
DOWNFALLU-CHEAT.title: Cheat
DOWNFALLU-COALESCENCE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the end of your turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] up to {CoalescencePower:diff()} cards.
DOWNFALLU-COALESCENCE.title: Coalescence
DOWNFALLU-COMBO.description: Put the first {IfUpgraded:show:ComboPower:diff() |}[gold]Dead On[/gold] Attack or Skill triggered each turn back into your hand.
DOWNFALLU-COMBO.title: Combo
DOWNFALLU-COVET.description:
Discard 1 card.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Discarded [gold]Curses[/gold] are Exhausted.
DOWNFALLU-COVET.title: Covet
DOWNFALLU-CURSED_WEAPON.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Permanently increase ALL [gold]Cursed Weapons'[/gold] damage by {Increase:diff()}.
DOWNFALLU-CURSED_WEAPON.title: Cursed Weapon
DOWNFALLU-DEADEYE.title: Deadeye
DOWNFALLU-DEAD_MANS_HAND.description:
Discard your hand.
Add the {Cards:diff()} rarest cards from your draw pile to your hand.
DOWNFALLU-DEAD_MANS_HAND.title: Dead Man's Hand
DOWNFALLU-DEAD_OR_ALIVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage X times.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], gain [gold]Bounty[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-DEAD_OR_ALIVE.title: Dead Or Alive
DOWNFALLU-DEBTS_OF_SIN.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] ALL [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards from other players.
Add ALL exhausted curse cards to your hand.
DOWNFALLU-DEBTS_OF_SIN.title: Debts of Sin
DOWNFALLU-DEFEND_HERMIT.title: Defend
DOWNFALLU-DESPERADO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Double this card's damage this combat.
It costs 1 more.
DOWNFALLU-DESPERADO.title: Desperado
DOWNFALLU-DETERMINATION.description: Whenever a debuff is applied to you, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-DETERMINATION.title: Determination
DOWNFALLU-DISSOLVE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Block is not removed at the start of your next {BlurPower:diff()} turns.
DOWNFALLU-DISSOLVE.title: Dissolve
DOWNFALLU-DIVE.title: Dive
DOWNFALLU-ENERVATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]:
Gain Energy and draw a card.
DOWNFALLU-ENERVATE.title: Enervate
DOWNFALLU-ETERNAL_FORM.description: First {EternalPower:diff()} playable cards drawn at the start of each turn cost 1 less that turn.
DOWNFALLU-ETERNAL_FORM.title: Eternal Form
DOWNFALLU-ETERNAL_SENTENCE.description:
All cards cost 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
You can no longer gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
At the start of your turn, add a random [gold]Curse[/gold] to your hand.
DOWNFALLU-ETERNAL_SENTENCE.title: Eternal Sentence
DOWNFALLU-EYE_OF_THE_STORM.title: Eye Of The Storm
DOWNFALLU-FATAL_DESIRE.description: At the start of your turn, draw {MachineLearningPower:diff()} cards and add an [gold]Injury[/gold] to your hand.
DOWNFALLU-FATAL_DESIRE.title: Fatal Desire
DOWNFALLU-FEINT.title: Feint
DOWNFALLU-FINAL_CANTER.description:
For each [gold]Curse[/gold] in your hand, deal {Damage:diff()} damage.{InCombat:
(Hits {Hits:diff()} times)|}
DOWNFALLU-FINAL_CANTER.title: Final Canter
DOWNFALLU-FLASH_POWDER.title: Flash Powder
DOWNFALLU-FROM_BEYOND.description:
For each card in your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold], a random enemy loses {HpLoss:diff()} HP.{InCombat:
(Causes {Hits:diff()} times)|}
DOWNFALLU-FROM_BEYOND.title: From Beyond
DOWNFALLU-FULLY_LOADED.description: Add ALL [gold]Strikes[/gold] and [gold]Defends[/gold] from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] to your hand.
DOWNFALLU-FULLY_LOADED.title: Fully Loaded
DOWNFALLU-GAMBIT.description: Put {Cards:diff()} random Attacks from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] into your hand. They cost 1 less during next play this turn.
DOWNFALLU-GAMBIT.title: Gambit
DOWNFALLU-GESTALT.title: Gestalt
DOWNFALLU-GHOSTLY_PRESENCE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Dead On[/gold]:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
DOWNFALLU-GHOSTLY_PRESENCE.title: Ghostly Presence
DOWNFALLU-GLARE.title: Glare
DOWNFALLU-GOLDEN_BULLET.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], permanently reduce this card's cost by 1.
DOWNFALLU-GOLDEN_BULLET.title: Golden Bullet
DOWNFALLU-GRUDGE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} more for ALL your Curse cards.
DOWNFALLU-GRUDGE.title: Grudge
DOWNFALLU-HEADSHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]: Deal double damage.
DOWNFALLU-HEADSHOT.title: Headshot
DOWNFALLU-HEROIC_BRAVADO.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Rugged[/gold].
Increase this card's cost by {Energy:energyIcons()} this combat.
DOWNFALLU-HEROIC_BRAVADO.title: Heroic Bravado
DOWNFALLU-HIGH_CALIBER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Strike+|Strike}[/gold] with [gold]Sharp[/gold] {SharpAmount:diff()} to your hand.
DOWNFALLU-HIGH_CALIBER.title: High-Caliber
DOWNFALLU-HIGH_NOON.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Strike[/gold] or [gold]Defend[/gold], draw a card.
DOWNFALLU-HIGH_NOON.title: High Noon
DOWNFALLU-HOLE_UP.title: Hole Up
DOWNFALLU-HORROR.description:
Apply {BruisePower:diff()} [gold]Bruise[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Bruise[/gold] does not wear off this turn.
DOWNFALLU-HORROR.title: Horror
DOWNFALLU-IMPENDING_DOOM.description: If this is [gold]Dead On[/gold] at the end of your turn, deal 13 damage to you and ALL enemies.
DOWNFALLU-IMPENDING_DOOM.title: Impending Doom
DOWNFALLU-ITCHY_TRIGGER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]: Reduce the cost of a random card in your hand by {CostReduction:diff()} this turn.
DOWNFALLU-ITCHY_TRIGGER.title: Itchy Trigger
DOWNFALLU-LONE_WOLF.description:
Choose a card.
It costs 0 before played.
Discard the rest of your hand.
DOWNFALLU-LONE_WOLF.title: Lone Wolf
DOWNFALLU-LOW_PROFILE.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {CalculationExtra:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold] for each debuff on you.
DOWNFALLU-LOW_PROFILE.title: Low Profile
DOWNFALLU-LUCK_OF_THE_DRAW.description: Draw cards until their total cost is {Energy:energyIcons()} or more.
DOWNFALLU-LUCK_OF_THE_DRAW.title: Luck of the Draw
DOWNFALLU-MAGNUM.description:
Discard {Cards:diff()} cards.
For each card, deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
DOWNFALLU-MAGNUM.title: Magnum
DOWNFALLU-MAINTENANCE.description:
Strikes deal {MaintenanceStrikePower:diff()} more damage this combat.
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
This costs 1 more each time you play it.
DOWNFALLU-MAINTENANCE.title: Maintenance
DOWNFALLU-MALICE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you Exhaust a Curse, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies instead.
DOWNFALLU-MALICE.title: Malice
DOWNFALLU-MANIFEST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Decay[/gold] to your hand.
DOWNFALLU-MANIFEST.title: Manifest
DOWNFALLU-MEMENTO_CARD.description: Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to you and ALL enemies.
DOWNFALLU-MEMENTO_CARD.title: Memento
DOWNFALLU-MIDNIGHT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add an [gold]Impending Doom[/gold] to your hand.
DOWNFALLU-MIDNIGHT.title: Midnight
DOWNFALLU-MISFIRE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Shuffle a [gold]Clumsy[/gold] into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-MISFIRE.title: Misfire
DOWNFALLU-NO_HOLDS_BARRED.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {BruisePower:diff()} [gold]Bruise[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Lose {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
DOWNFALLU-NO_HOLDS_BARRED.title: No Holds Barred
DOWNFALLU-ONE_FLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt first.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-ONE_FLASH.title: One Flash
DOWNFALLU-OVERWHELMING_POWER.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Whenever you end your turn with 0 Energy, lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
DOWNFALLU-OVERWHELMING_POWER.title: Overwhelming Power
DOWNFALLU-PISTOL_WHIP.title: Pistol Whip
DOWNFALLU-PURGATORY.title: Purgatory
DOWNFALLU-QUICKDRAW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Next turn, draw 1 less card.
DOWNFALLU-QUICKDRAW.title: Quickdraw
DOWNFALLU-REPRIEVE.title: Reprieve
DOWNFALLU-RICOCHET.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect triggered this turn, deal it again to a random enemy.{InCombat:
(Hits {Hits:diff()} more times)|}
DOWNFALLU-RICOCHET.title: Ricochet
DOWNFALLU-ROUGHHOUSE.title: Roughhouse
DOWNFALLU-ROULETTE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Discard your hand.
Draw that many cards.
DOWNFALLU-ROULETTE.title: Roulette
DOWNFALLU-ROUNDHOUSE_KICK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Stun[/gold] any that don't intend to attack.
DOWNFALLU-ROUNDHOUSE_KICK.title: Roundhouse Kick
DOWNFALLU-SCAVENGE.title: Scavenge
DOWNFALLU-SHADOW_CLOAK.description: Whenever you draw or [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a Curse card, gain {ShadowCloakPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-SHADOW_CLOAK.title: Shadow Cloak
DOWNFALLU-SHORT_FUSE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Costs 1 less per [gold]Strike[/gold] or [gold]Defend[/gold] played this turn.
DOWNFALLU-SHORT_FUSE.title: Short Fuse
DOWNFALLU-SHOWDOWN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Play all [gold]Strikes[/gold] in your hand to random enemies.
DOWNFALLU-SHOWDOWN.title: Showdown
DOWNFALLU-SNAPSHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt first.
DOWNFALLU-SNAPSHOT.title: Snapshot
DOWNFALLU-SNIPE.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Concentrate[/gold].
}Your next [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect triggered by Attack or Skill this turn triggers twice.
DOWNFALLU-SNIPE.title: Snipe
DOWNFALLU-SPITE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards in your hand.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
DOWNFALLU-SPITE.title: Spite
DOWNFALLU-SPRAY_PRAY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
Shuffle a [gold]Doubt[/gold] into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-SPRAY_PRAY.title: Spray n' Pray
DOWNFALLU-STRIKE_HERMIT.title: Strike
DOWNFALLU-TAKE_AIM.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Concentrate[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-TAKE_AIM.title: Take Aim
DOWNFALLU-TAKE_COVER.description: Add a 0-cost [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Defend+|Defend}[/gold] with [gold]Nimble[/gold] 3X to your hand.
DOWNFALLU-TAKE_COVER.title: Take Cover
DOWNFALLU-TRACKING_SHOT.title: Tracking Shots
DOWNFALLU-VANTAGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Dead On[/gold]: Draw and Upgrade {Cards:diff()} card(s).
DOWNFALLU-VANTAGE.title: Vantage
DOWNFALLU-VIRTUE.description: Reduce each stackable debuff on you by {Reduce:diff()}.
DOWNFALLU-VIRTUE.title: Virtue
DOWNFALLU-WIDE_OPEN.title: Wide Open
